system.notes:
Heavily armed battleship of space, enforcing national policy far from Earth.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.39): Gunship · 2500 · 8 · 4 · Chemical, Nuclear · 8, 15 · Batteries, Nuclear, Solar · 80% · 4 · 200m3 · 6 · 14 · 4 · 20 · 7 · 2 DS-OTVs, 4 deltas

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 2500 million eb; Crew 8; Passengers 4; Drive Type Chemical, Nuclear; Burn Elements 8, 15; Power Type Batteries, Nuclear, Solar; Sensors 80%; Computers 4; Cargo 200m3; Actions 6; Weapon Spaces 14; Armor (max SP) 4; Damage Points 20; Overkill Points 7; Shuttlecraft 2 DS-OTVs, 4 deltas.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
